comments.deps: To use published npm packages, replace link: entry with: "@flakeytesting/cli": "latest"
comments.zap: OWASP ZAP must be installed locally or run via Docker. See https://www.zaproxy.org/docs/docker/

scripts.test:api: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/zap/wrk ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-api-scan.py -t $TARGET_URL -f openapi -J /zap/wrk/zap-report.json -x /zap/wrk/zap-report.xml -c /zap/wrk/rules.tsv || true; node scripts/convert.js; node scripts/upload.js api
